BAKED TOMATO
RISOTTO WITH
BASIL

A modern twist on traditional risotto, baked in the oven for even cooking and enriched
with fresh tomatoes and basil.

Ingredients:
300g arborio rice
600ml hot vegetable stock
400g canned tomatoes, crushed
1 medium onion, finely diced
4 cloves garlic, minced
100ml dry white wine
1 tablespoon olive oil
50g butter
50g parmesan cheese, grated
1 tablespoon tomato paste
Large handful fresh basil, roughly torn
Salt and pepper to taste
Extra basil leaves for garnish

Method:
Preheat oven to 190°C. Heat olive oil in large oven-safe pan over medium heat. Sauté onion
and garlic until translucent, about 3 minutes. Add rice and stir constantly for 2 minutes.

Pour in white wine and stir until absorbed. Add tomato paste and crushed tomatoes, stir well.
Pour hot stock over rice, season with salt and pepper. Stir once more, then transfer to oven.

Bake covered for 25-30 minutes until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed. Remove from oven,
stir in butter, parmesan, and fresh basil. Adjust seasoning. Cover and let rest for 2 minutes.

Serve immediately, topped with extra fresh basil leaves and additional parmesan cheese.

Serves: 4
Preparation: 10 minutes
Cooking: 35 minutes
